name: core/get-site-info
label: Get Site Information
description: Returns site information configured in WordPress. By default returns all fields, or optionally a filtered subset.

fields.description: Optional: Limit response to specific fields. If omitted, all fields are returned.

name: core/get-environment-info
label: Get Environment Info
description: Returns core details about the site's runtime context for diagnostics and compatibility (environment, PHP runtime, database server info, WordPress version).

environment.description: The site's runtime environment classification (can be one of these: production, staging, development, local).

php_version.description: The PHP runtime version executing WordPress.

db_server_info.description: The database server vendor and version string reported by the driver.

wp_version.description: The WordPress core version running on this site.

name: wpcode/list-snippets
label: List Code Snippets
description: Provides a summary of all snippets and their active/inactive status

name: wpcode/detect-snippet-errors
label: Detect Snippet Errors
description: Checks if WPCode's error handler has flagged any active snippets

name: wpcode/get-error-logs
label: Get Error Logs
description: Provides the stack trace of recent snippet-related failures

name: wpcode/search-library
label: Search WPCode Library
description: Queries the WPCode Cloud Library for snippets matching a keyword

name: wpcode/get-settings
label: Get WPCode Settings
description: Reads global settings (e.g., "Safe Mode" status)

name: elementor-mcp/list-widgets
label: List Elementor Widgets
description: Returns all registered Elementor widget types with their names, titles, icons, categories, and keywords. Optionally filter by widget category.

name: elementor-mcp/get-widget-schema
label: Get Widget Schema
description: Returns the full JSON Schema for a widget type's settings, describing all available controls and their types. Use this to discover what settings a widget accepts before creating or updating it.

name: elementor-mcp/get-container-schema
label: Get Container Schema
description: Returns JSON Schema for all container controls (flex + grid), including flex_direction, justify_content, align_items, flex_wrap, gap, content_width, min_height, container_type, grid controls, background, border, padding, and more.

name: elementor-mcp/get-page-structure
label: Get Page Structure
description: Returns the element tree for an Elementor page, showing all containers, widgets, and their nesting structure. Each element includes its ID, type, widget type (for widgets), and child elements.

name: elementor-mcp/get-element-settings
label: Get Element Settings
description: Returns the current settings for a specific element on a page. Provide the post ID and element ID to retrieve all control values for that element.

name: elementor-mcp/find-element
label: Find Element
description: Searches elements on a page by type, widget type, or settings content. Returns matching element IDs, types, and a settings preview.

widget_type.description: Filter by widget type (e.g. "heading", "button"). Leave empty for all.

search_text.description: Search for text content in settings values (case-insensitive).

name: elementor-mcp/list-pages
label: List Elementor Pages
description: Returns all WordPress pages and posts that are built with Elementor. Optionally filter by post type and status.

post_type.description: Filter by post type (e.g. "page", "post"). Default: any.

status.description: Filter by post status (e.g. "publish", "draft"). Default: any.

name: elementor-mcp/list-templates
label: List Elementor Templates
description: Returns all saved Elementor templates from the template library. Optionally filter by template type (page, section, container).

name: elementor-mcp/get-global-settings
label: Get Global Settings
description: Returns the active Elementor kit/global settings including colors, typography, spacing, and breakpoints. These are the site-wide design tokens used across all pages.

name: elementor-mcp/create-page
label: Create Elementor Page
description: Creates a new WordPress page with Elementor enabled. Optionally provide initial element content.

name: elementor-mcp/update-page-settings
label: Update Page Settings
description: Updates page-level Elementor settings such as background, padding, custom CSS, and layout options.

name: elementor-mcp/delete-page-content
label: Delete Page Content
description: Clears all Elementor content from a page, resetting it to blank while keeping the page itself.

name: elementor-mcp/import-template
label: Import Template
description: Imports a JSON template structure into a page at an optional position.

template_json.description: Elementor JSON element structure to import.

name: elementor-mcp/export-page
label: Export Page
description: Exports a page's full Elementor data as a JSON structure that can be imported elsewhere.

name: elementor-mcp/add-container
label: Add Container
description: Adds a container to a page. Supports both flex (default) and grid layouts via container_type. Omit parent_id for top-level, or provide a parent container ID for nesting. Flex tips: Use flex_direction=row for side-by-side children, flex_wrap=wrap for wrapping. Grid tips: Set container_type=grid with grid_columns_grid, grid_rows_grid, grid_gaps. Background: set background_background=classic and background_color=#hex. Border: set border_border=solid, border_width, border_color. Also supports min_height, overflow, html_tag, padding, margin, position, z_index, animation.

parent_id.description: Parent container ID for nesting. Omit for top-level.

settings.description: Container settings: flex_direction, flex_wrap, justify_content, align_items, gap, content_width, padding, margin, background, border, etc.

name: elementor-mcp/update-container
label: Update Container
description: Updates settings on an existing container. Settings are merged (partial update). Supports all container controls: flex_direction, justify_content, align_items, flex_wrap, align_content, gap, content_width, min_height, overflow, html_tag, container_type, grid controls, background (set background_background=classic first), border (set border_border=solid first), border_radius, box_shadow, padding, margin, position, z_index, animation, shape dividers, etc.

settings.description: Partial settings to merge into the container.

name: elementor-mcp/update-element
label: Update Element
description: Updates settings on any element (container or widget). Settings are merged (partial update). Works for all element types — no need to know if the target is a container or widget.

settings.description: Partial settings to merge into the element.

name: elementor-mcp/batch-update
label: Batch Update Elements
description: Updates multiple elements in a single save operation. Each operation specifies an element_id and settings to merge. Much more efficient than calling update-element multiple times.

name: elementor-mcp/reorder-elements
label: Reorder Elements
description: Reorders the children of a container by providing an ordered array of element IDs. All IDs must be direct children of the specified container.

element_ids.description: Ordered array of child element IDs in the desired order.

name: elementor-mcp/move-element
label: Move Element
description: Moves an element to a new parent container and/or position within the page tree.

target_parent_id.description: Target parent container ID. Empty string for top-level.

name: elementor-mcp/remove-element
label: Remove Element
description: Removes an element and all its children from a page.

name: elementor-mcp/duplicate-element
label: Duplicate Element
description: Duplicates an element (including all children) with fresh IDs. The duplicate is placed immediately after the original.

name: elementor-mcp/add-widget
label: Add Widget
description: Adds any Elementor widget to a container. Use get-widget-schema to discover the available settings for each widget type.

name: elementor-mcp/update-widget
label: Update Widget
description: Updates settings on an existing widget. Settings are merged (partial update).

name: elementor-mcp/add-heading
label: Add Heading
description: Adds a heading widget. Supports full typography (set typography_typography=custom first), text stroke, text shadow, blend mode, hover color. Also accepts responsive suffixes (align_tablet, align_mobile) and common advanced controls (_margin, _padding, _background_*, _border_*, etc).

typography_typography.description: Set to "custom" to enable typography controls.

typography_font_size.description: Font size: {size, unit}. Units: px, em, rem, vw.

typography_line_height.description: Line height: {size, unit}. Units: px, em.

typography_letter_spacing.description: Letter spacing: {size, unit}. Units: px, em.

name: elementor-mcp/add-text-editor
label: Add Text Editor
description: Adds a rich text editor widget. Supports typography (set typography_typography=custom), drop cap, text columns, and text color. Accepts responsive suffixes and advanced controls.

drop_cap.description: Enable drop cap on first letter.

column_gap.description: Column gap: {size, unit}. Works with text_columns.

typography_typography.description: Set to "custom" to enable typography controls.

name: elementor-mcp/add-image
label: Add Image
description: Adds an image widget. Supports width, max-width, opacity, border, border-radius, box shadow, CSS filters (brightness, contrast, saturation, hue), and hover effects. Accepts responsive suffixes and advanced controls.

image.description: Image object with url (required) and optional id.

width.description: Image width: {size, unit}. Units: px, %, vw.

object_fit.description: Object fit when height is set.

hover_animation.description: Hover animation (grow, shrink, pulse, push, etc).

css_filters_css_filter.description: Set to "custom" to enable CSS filter controls.

image_border_width.description: Border width: {top, right, bottom, left, unit, isLinked}.

image_border_radius.description: Border radius: {top, right, bottom, left, unit, isLinked}.

image_box_shadow_box_shadow.description: Box shadow: {horizontal, vertical, blur, spread, color}.

name: elementor-mcp/add-button
label: Add Button
description: Adds a button widget. Supports typography (set typography_typography=custom), border, background, hover colors, box shadow, and text shadow. Accepts responsive suffixes and advanced controls.

selected_icon.description: Icon object with value and library.

hover_animation.description: Hover animation (e.g. grow, shrink, pulse, push).

border_width.description: Border width: {top, right, bottom, left, unit, isLinked}.

border_radius.description: Border radius: {top, right, bottom, left, unit, isLinked}.

button_box_shadow_box_shadow.description: Box shadow: {horizontal, vertical, blur, spread, color}.

typography_typography.description: Set to "custom" to enable typography controls.

button_padding.description: Button padding: {top, right, bottom, left, unit, isLinked}.

name: elementor-mcp/add-video
label: Add Video
description: Adds a video widget. Supports YouTube, Vimeo, Dailymotion, self-hosted. Options: start/end time, lazy load, privacy mode, image overlay, play icon. Accepts responsive suffixes and advanced controls.

name: elementor-mcp/add-icon
label: Add Icon
description: Adds an icon widget. Supports Font Awesome and SVG icons, view modes (default/stacked/framed), hover colors, rotate, padding, border radius, and hover animation. For SVG, first use upload-svg-icon.

selected_icon.description: Icon object. Font Awesome: { "value": "fas fa-star", "library": "fa-solid" }. SVG: { "value": { "id": 123, "url": "..." }, "library": "svg" }. Libraries: fa-solid, fa-regular, fa-brands.

hover_animation.description: Hover animation (grow, shrink, pulse, push, etc).

border_width.description: Border width for framed view: {size, unit}.

name: elementor-mcp/add-spacer
label: Add Spacer
description: Adds a spacer widget for vertical spacing between elements.

name: elementor-mcp/add-divider
label: Add Divider
description: Adds a horizontal divider/separator widget with style, weight, color, and width options.

name: elementor-mcp/add-icon-box
label: Add Icon Box
description: Adds an icon box widget. Supports icon position (top/left/right), title typography (set title_typography_typography=custom), description typography, icon spacing, hover colors, and hover animation. Accepts responsive suffixes and advanced controls.

selected_icon.description: Icon object. Font Awesome: { "value": "fas fa-star", "library": "fa-solid" }. SVG: { "value": { "id": 123, "url": "..." }, "library": "svg" }.

icon_space.description: Space between icon and content: {size, unit}.

title_typography_typography.description: Set to "custom" to enable title typography.

description_typography_typography.description: Set to "custom" to enable description typography.

name: elementor-mcp/add-accordion
label: Add Accordion
description: Adds an accordion widget. Supports title/content colors, background, border, typography (set title_typography_typography=custom), spacing, icon color, and FAQ schema. Accepts responsive suffixes and advanced controls.

tabs.description: Array of accordion items with tab_title and tab_content.

selected_icon.description: Icon when collapsed. Default: fas fa-plus.

selected_active_icon.description: Icon when expanded. Default: fas fa-minus.

title_padding.description: Title padding: {top, right, bottom, left, unit, isLinked}.

icon_space.description: Space between icon and title: {size, unit}.

content_padding.description: Content padding: {top, right, bottom, left, unit, isLinked}.

title_typography_typography.description: Set to "custom" to enable title typography.

content_typography_typography.description: Set to "custom" to enable content typography.

name: elementor-mcp/add-alert
label: Add Alert
description: Adds an alert/notice widget with type, title, and description.

name: elementor-mcp/add-counter
label: Add Counter
description: Adds an animated counter widget that counts up to a number.

name: elementor-mcp/add-google-maps
label: Add Google Maps
description: Adds an embedded Google Maps widget with address, zoom, and height.

name: elementor-mcp/add-icon-list
label: Add Icon List
description: Adds a list widget with icons and text. Great for feature lists, checklists, and contact info.

icon_list.description: Array of list items with text, selected_icon, and optional link.

view.description: Layout: traditional (vertical) or inline. Default: traditional.

name: elementor-mcp/add-image-box
label: Add Image Box
description: Adds an image box widget with image, title, and description. Great for service cards.

image.description: Image object with url and optional id.

name: elementor-mcp/add-image-carousel
label: Add Image Carousel
description: Adds a rotating image carousel/slider widget.

carousel.description: Array of image objects with url and optional id.

name: elementor-mcp/add-progress
label: Add Progress Bar
description: Adds an animated progress bar widget with label and percentage.

name: elementor-mcp/add-social-icons
label: Add Social Icons
description: Adds social media icon links. Great for headers and footers.

social_icon_list.description: Array of social items with social_icon and link.

name: elementor-mcp/add-star-rating
label: Add Star Rating
description: Adds a star rating display widget.

name: elementor-mcp/add-tabs
label: Add Tabs
description: Adds a tabbed content widget with horizontal or vertical layout.

tabs.description: Array of tab items with tab_title and tab_content.

name: elementor-mcp/add-testimonial
label: Add Testimonial
description: Adds a testimonial widget with quote, author name, job title, and image.

testimonial_image.description: Author image object with url and optional id.

name: elementor-mcp/add-toggle
label: Add Toggle
description: Adds a toggle widget (multiple items can be open). Supports title/content colors, background, border, typography (set title_typography_typography=custom), spacing, and icon color. Accepts responsive suffixes and advanced controls.

tabs.description: Array of toggle items with tab_title and tab_content.

title_padding.description: Title padding: {top, right, bottom, left, unit, isLinked}.

icon_space.description: Space between icon and title: {size, unit}.

content_padding.description: Content padding: {top, right, bottom, left, unit, isLinked}.

title_typography_typography.description: Set to "custom" to enable title typography.

content_typography_typography.description: Set to "custom" to enable content typography.

name: elementor-mcp/add-html
label: Add HTML
description: Adds a custom HTML code widget.

name: elementor-mcp/add-menu-anchor
label: Add Menu Anchor
description: Adds a menu anchor for one-page navigation.

anchor.description: The anchor ID (used in menu links as #id).

name: elementor-mcp/add-shortcode
label: Add Shortcode
description: Adds a WordPress shortcode widget.

shortcode.description: The shortcode to render, e.g. [contact-form-7 id="123"].

name: elementor-mcp/add-rating
label: Add Rating
description: Adds a star/icon rating widget.

name: elementor-mcp/add-text-path
label: Add Text Path
description: Adds curved/path text widget.

name: elementor-mcp/add-form
label: Add Form (Pro)
description: Adds an Elementor Pro form. Supports field types (text, email, textarea, url, tel, select, radio, checkbox, number, date, time, upload, acceptance, password, html, hidden, step), submit button styling, submit actions (email, redirect, webhook, mailchimp, drip, activecampaign, getresponse, convertkit, mailerlite, slack), email settings, redirect, and success/error messages. Accepts responsive suffixes and advanced controls.

button_width.description: Full-width button. Set to "100" for full width.

email_reply_to.description: Reply-to email (use field shortcode like [field id="email"]).

redirect_to.description: Redirect URL after submit (requires "redirect" in submit_actions).

mark_required.description: Show asterisk on required fields. Default: yes.

button_typography_typography.description: Set to "custom" to enable button typography.

name: elementor-mcp/add-posts-grid
label: Add Posts Grid (Pro)
description: Adds an Elementor Pro posts grid widget to display a grid of posts.

name: elementor-mcp/add-countdown
label: Add Countdown (Pro)
description: Adds a countdown timer. Supports due_date or evergreen mode, custom labels, expire actions (hide/redirect/message), and digit/label colors and typography. Accepts responsive suffixes and advanced controls.

due_date.description: Due date in Y-m-d H:i format.

name: elementor-mcp/add-price-table
label: Add Price Table (Pro)
description: Adds a pricing table. Supports 16 currency symbols, sale pricing, ribbon, footer info, button CSS ID, feature icons, and style controls (header/pricing/features/footer/button/ribbon colors and typography). Accepts responsive suffixes and advanced controls.

currency_format.description: Price format: comma or dot separator.

original_price.description: Original price (shown crossed out when sale=yes).

features_list.description: Feature list. Each item: {item_text, selected_item_icon, item_icon_color}.

footer_additional_info.description: Footer text below button (e.g. "30-day money back").

name: elementor-mcp/add-flip-box
label: Add Flip Box (Pro)
description: Adds a flip box with front/back sides. Supports icon/image graphics, flip effects (flip/slide/push/zoom/fade), height, front/back background colors, title/description colors and typography. Accepts responsive suffixes and advanced controls.

name: elementor-mcp/add-animated-headline
label: Add Animated Headline (Pro)
description: Adds an Elementor Pro animated headline with highlight or rotating text effects.

name: elementor-mcp/add-call-to-action
label: Add Call to Action (Pro)
description: Adds a call-to-action widget with title, description, button, and optional graphic/ribbon.

link.description: Button link object with url key.

graphic_image.description: Image object with url and optional id.

selected_icon.description: Icon object with value and library.

name: elementor-mcp/add-slides
label: Add Slides (Pro)
description: Adds a full-width slides/slider. Supports heading, description, button per slide, background image/color/overlay, Ken Burns, content animation, height, navigation, autoplay, colors, typography. Accepts responsive suffixes and advanced controls.

slides_padding.description: Content padding: {top, right, bottom, left, unit, isLinked}.

name: elementor-mcp/add-testimonial-carousel
label: Add Testimonial Carousel (Pro)
description: Adds a testimonial carousel. Supports skins (default/bubble), layouts, navigation (arrows/dots), slide spacing, background/text/border colors, image size, content gap, and name/title/content typography. Accepts responsive suffixes and advanced controls.

slides.description: Array of testimonial items with content, image, name, and title.

slide_padding.description: Slide padding: {top, right, bottom, left, unit, isLinked}.

slide_border_radius.description: Slide border radius: {top, right, bottom, left, unit, isLinked}.

image_gap.description: Gap between image and text: {size, unit}.

image_border_radius.description: Image border radius: {top, right, bottom, left, unit, isLinked}.

name: elementor-mcp/add-price-list
label: Add Price List (Pro)
description: Adds a price list widget for menus, services, or product lists with title, price, and description.

price_list.description: Array of list items with title, price, item_description, image, and link.

name: elementor-mcp/add-gallery
label: Add Gallery (Pro)
description: Adds an advanced gallery. Supports grid/justified/masonry layouts, multiple galleries with filtering, aspect ratio, overlay effects, lightbox, lazy load, image border/radius, and hover opacity/CSS filters. Accepts responsive suffixes and advanced controls.

gallery.description: Array of image objects with id and url.

columns.description: Number of columns. Default: 4. Responsive: columns_tablet, columns_mobile.

gallery_type.description: Single or multiple galleries (with filter bar).

galleries.description: For gallery_type=multiple: array of {gallery_title, gallery (array of images)}.

ideal_row_height.description: Ideal row height for justified layout: {size, unit}.

image_border_radius.description: Image border radius: {top, right, bottom, left, unit, isLinked}.

image_border_width.description: Image border width: {top, right, bottom, left, unit, isLinked}.

name: elementor-mcp/add-share-buttons
label: Add Share Buttons (Pro)
description: Adds social share buttons for sharing the current page.

share_buttons.description: Array of share buttons with button (network name) and optional text.

button.description: Network: facebook, twitter, linkedin, pinterest, reddit, etc.

name: elementor-mcp/add-table-of-contents
label: Add Table of Contents (Pro)
description: Adds an auto-generated table of contents widget based on page headings.

title.description: TOC title. Default: Table of Contents.

name: elementor-mcp/add-blockquote
label: Add Blockquote (Pro)
description: Adds a styled blockquote widget with quote text, author, tweet button, colors, border, typography. Accepts responsive suffixes and advanced controls.

url_type.description: URL to share: current page or custom.

content_gap.description: Gap between quote and author: {size, unit}.

border_color.description: Border color (border skin) or quotation mark color (quotation skin).

border_gap.description: Gap between border and content: {size, unit}.

name: elementor-mcp/add-lottie
label: Add Lottie Animation (Pro)
description: Adds a Lottie animation widget. Supports triggers, loop, speed, renderer, sizing, link, viewport settings, opacity, CSS filters. Accepts responsive suffixes and advanced controls.

name: elementor-mcp/add-hotspot
label: Add Hotspot (Pro)
description: Adds an image hotspot widget with clickable/hoverable points. Supports tooltip settings, animations, hotspot sizing/colors, image width. Accepts responsive suffixes and advanced controls.

image.description: Background image object with url and optional id.

image_border_radius.description: Image border radius: {top, right, bottom, left, unit, isLinked}.

hotspot_padding.description: Hotspot padding: {top, right, bottom, left, unit, isLinked}.

hotspot_border_radius.description: Hotspot border radius: {top, right, bottom, left, unit, isLinked}.

hotspot_box_shadow_box_shadow_type.description: Set to "yes" for hotspot box shadow.

hotspot_box_shadow_box_shadow.description: Hotspot box shadow: {horizontal, vertical, blur, spread, color}.

tooltip_padding.description: Tooltip padding: {top, right, bottom, left, unit, isLinked}.

name: elementor-mcp/add-nav-menu
label: Add Navigation Menu
description: Adds a WordPress navigation menu widget (Pro).

menu_name.description: Menu name (as registered in WP Menus).

dropdown.description: Breakpoint for dropdown toggle. Default: tablet.

name: elementor-mcp/add-loop-grid
label: Add Loop Grid
description: Adds a loop grid widget that displays posts/pages/CPTs using a loop template (Pro).

name: elementor-mcp/add-loop-carousel
label: Add Loop Carousel
description: Adds a loop carousel widget that displays posts in a carousel using a loop template (Pro).

slides_to_scroll.description: Slides to scroll per step. Default: 1.

name: elementor-mcp/add-media-carousel
label: Add Media Carousel
description: Adds a media carousel widget for images/video with multiple skins (Pro).

slides.description: Array of slide items with image/video.

name: elementor-mcp/add-nested-tabs
label: Add Nested Tabs
description: Adds a modern nested tabs widget where each tab content is a container (Pro). Tab content can be populated by adding child elements to the tab containers after creation.

tabs_direction.description: Tab direction. block-start=top, block-end=bottom, inline-start=left, inline-end=right.

horizontal_scroll.description: Enable horizontal scroll for tabs. Default: disable.

breakpoint_selector.description: Breakpoint for accordion mode. Default: mobile.

tabs_title_typography_typography.description: Set to "yes" for custom tab typography.

name: elementor-mcp/add-nested-accordion
label: Add Nested Accordion
description: Adds a modern nested accordion widget where each item content is a container (Pro). Item content can be populated by adding child elements to the item containers after creation.

default_state.description: Default state. Default: expanded (first item open).

max_items_expended.description: Max items expanded at once. Default: one.

name: elementor-mcp/add-portfolio
label: Add Portfolio (Pro)
description: Adds an Elementor Pro portfolio widget to display a filterable grid of posts or custom post types.

posts_per_page.description: Number of posts to display. Default: 6.

show_filter_bar.description: Show category filter bar. Default: no.

show_title.description: Show post title overlay. Default: yes.

title_tag.description: HTML tag for the title. Default: h3.

name: elementor-mcp/add-author-box
label: Add Author Box (Pro)
description: Adds an Elementor Pro author box widget displaying the post author's avatar, name, bio, and a link to their posts.

author_name_tag.description: HTML tag for the author name. Default: h3.

show_link.description: Show link button to author posts. Default: yes.

link_text.description: Button label for the author posts link. Default: More Posts.

name: elementor-mcp/add-login
label: Add Login (Pro)
description: Adds an Elementor Pro login form widget with configurable fields, labels, remember me, lost password link, and post-login redirect.

button_text.description: Submit button label. Default: Log In.

redirect_after_login.description: Enable custom redirect after login. Default: no.

redirect_url.description: URL to redirect to after login (requires redirect_after_login=yes).

name: elementor-mcp/add-code-highlight
label: Add Code Highlight (Pro)
description: Adds a syntax-highlighted code block widget.

name: elementor-mcp/add-reviews
label: Add Reviews (Pro)
description: Adds a reviews/testimonials carousel widget.

slides_per_view.description: Number of slides visible at once. Default: 3.

pause_on_hover.description: Pause autoplay on hover. Default: yes.

name: elementor-mcp/add-off-canvas
label: Add Off-Canvas (Pro)
description: Adds an off-canvas panel widget.

prevent_scroll.description: Lock body scroll when open. Default: yes.

name: elementor-mcp/add-progress-tracker
label: Add Progress Tracker (Pro)
description: Adds a scroll progress tracker widget.

circular_size.description: Circle diameter in pixels (circular type). Default: 200.

circular_width.description: Circle stroke width in pixels (circular type). Default: 8.

name: elementor-mcp/add-search
label: Add Search (Pro)
description: Adds a search widget with live results support.

search_input_placeholder_text.description: Placeholder text for the search input. Default: Search...

live_results.description: Enable live search results dropdown. Default: no.

search_query_post_type.description: Post type to search. Default: any.

name: elementor-mcp/save-as-template
label: Save As Template
description: Saves a page or a specific element as a reusable Elementor template.

element_id.description: Specific element ID to save. Omit to save the entire page.

name: elementor-mcp/apply-template
label: Apply Template
description: Applies a saved Elementor template to a page at a given position, inserting its elements with fresh IDs.

template_id.description: The template post ID to apply.

parent_id.description: Parent container ID. Empty for top-level.

name: elementor-mcp/create-theme-template
label: Create Theme Template
description: Creates a new Elementor Pro theme builder template (header, footer, single, archive, 404, etc.).

name: elementor-mcp/set-template-conditions
label: Set Template Conditions
description: Sets display conditions for a theme builder template (e.g., Entire Site, specific pages, post types).

conditions.description: Array of condition rules. Each is an array like ["include", "general"] for Entire Site, or ["include", "singular", "post"] for all posts.

name: elementor-mcp/list-dynamic-tags
label: List Dynamic Tags
description: Lists all available Elementor Pro dynamic tags with their names, groups, and categories.

group.description: Filter by tag group (e.g., "post", "site", "author", "media", "action", "woocommerce"). Omit for all.

name: elementor-mcp/set-dynamic-tag
label: Set Dynamic Tag
description: Sets a dynamic tag on a specific setting of an element. This makes the setting value dynamic (e.g., title becomes post title).

setting_key.description: The setting key to make dynamic (e.g., "title", "url", "image").

tag_settings.description: Optional settings for the dynamic tag.

name: elementor-mcp/create-popup
label: Create Popup
description: Creates a new Elementor Pro popup template.

name: elementor-mcp/set-popup-settings
label: Set Popup Settings
description: Configures popup triggers, timing, and display conditions for an Elementor Pro popup.

triggers.description: Trigger settings: { "on_page_load": {"enabled": true, "delay": 3}, "on_scroll": {"enabled": true, "direction": "down", "offset": 50}, "on_click": {"enabled": true, "times": 1}, "on_exit_intent": {"enabled": true}, "on_inactivity": {"enabled": true, "time": 30} }.

conditions.description: Display conditions, same format as set-template-conditions.

name: elementor-mcp/update-global-colors
label: Update Global Colors
description: Updates the site-wide color palette in the Elementor kit. Provide an array of color objects with id, title, and color (hex).

name: elementor-mcp/update-global-typography
label: Update Global Typography
description: Updates the site-wide typography settings in the Elementor kit.

typography_font_size.description: Font size with size and unit.

typography_line_height.description: Line height with size and unit.

typography_letter_spacing.description: Letter spacing with size and unit.

name: elementor-mcp/build-page
label: Build Page
description: Creates a complete Elementor page from a declarative structure in a single call. Supports nested containers and any widget types. IMPORTANT LAYOUT RULES: (1) For side-by-side columns, use a parent container with flex_direction=row — children are auto-set to content_width=full with equal percentage widths (e.g. 2 children = 50%, 3 = 33.33%). (2) NEVER set flex_wrap or _flex_size in settings — these cause layout overflow. The tool handles layout automatically. (3) Background colors: set background_background=classic and background_color=#hex on containers. (4) Background images: set background_background=classic, background_image={url,id}, background_size=cover. (5) Background overlay: background_overlay_background=classic, background_overlay_color=#hex, background_overlay_opacity={size:0.7,unit:px}. (6) Text alignment: text_align on text/heading widgets. (7) Use search-images and sideload-image tools to get real images before building.

structure.description: Declarative element tree. Each item has type (container|widget), settings, and optionally children (for containers) or widget_type (for widgets).

name: elementor-mcp/search-images
label: Search Images
description: Searches Openverse (WordPress.org) for Creative Commons licensed images. Returns image URLs, thumbnails, licensing info, and attribution. Use the returned URLs with sideload-image or add-stock-image.

license.description: Filter by Creative Commons license type.

aspect_ratio.description: Filter by aspect ratio. Use "wide" for landscape images (recommended for hero banners, cards, and most page layouts). Use "tall" for portrait/sidebar images. Use "square" for avatars and thumbnails.
